title: Pan-Seared Norwegian Salmon with Spicy Potato Wedges
description: A flavorful dish featuring pan-seared Norwegian salmon paired with spicy potato wedges. The peppery flavor of the potatoes complements the juicy salmon perfectly.
instructions: Cut the potatoes into wedges and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with peppery olive oil and sprinkle with salt, black pepper, and diced jalapenos. Toss to coat.
Bake in the oven for 20-25 minutes or until crispy.
While the potatoes are baking, season the salmon fillets with salt and black pepper.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and add a small amount of peppery olive oil. Sear the salmon fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side or until cooked through.
Serve the salmon with the spicy potato wedges and a squeeze of lemon juice.
